description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Builds that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a Windows job matrix with multiple configurations to build Godot with different settings, including editor, profiling editor, and template builds with various precision and tracy settings. For each build, clone the Godot repository, set up Python, install SCons and required packages, load and upload the SCons cache, and compile the build with explicit flags.
